---
name: User Story
about: Propose a new feature or functionality
title: '[STORY] '
labels: ['user-story', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## User Story

As a **[user type]** (e.g., gamer, admin, developer),  
I want **[goal/desire]**  
so that **[benefit/value]**.

## Acceptance Criteria

Define what "done" looks like for this story:

- [ ] Criterion 1 (specific, measurable outcome)
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Notes

**Implementation details** (optional):
- Architecture considerations
- Technology choices
- Database changes needed
- API endpoints required
- UI components needed

**Dependencies** (optional):
- Depends on #XX
- Blocks #YY
- Related to #ZZ

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code follows [`.github/instructions/`](../../.github/instructions/)
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing (80%+ coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests added if applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, architecture docs, etc.)
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] CI checks passing
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Implementation summary created in [`docs/user-stories/`](../../docs/summary-reports/user-stories-status.md) (US-XX-IMPLEMENTATION-SUMMARY.md)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

**For AI Agents:** 
- Create a feature branch: `feature/user-story-XX-description`
- Follow [`.github/instructions/`](../../.github/instructions/)
- **Required**: In your PR description, use `Closes #XX` to auto-close this user story when the PR is merged to `main`
- Create an implementation summary in [`docs/user-stories/`](../../docs/summary-reports/user-stories-status.md) when complete
- Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#for-ai-agents) before starting work
